title: My's Armor HUD
description: This mod show you the armor you wearing with the number of the durability and the matching collor
body:
This mod show you the armor you wear in the corner. You can also see the number of the durability, the bar, that also shows you the durability and the matching collor.
>50% = white
<50% = yellow
<25% = orange
<10% = red
